duplicate_policy: raw release records are counted separately from collapsed first-seen InChIKey/scaffold index rows
policy_notes: Real ChEMBL chemreps release-index run from uploaded verified files. Invalid ChEMBL SMILES are skipped only for NN lower-bound fingerprinting; exact and scaffold indexes are preserved. Scaffold counts are first-seen index counts; cumulative first-seen scaffolds are monotonic by construction.
